description.team: Deliver the latest aggregated doc digests straight to the homepage so you do not need to keep checking Inbox just to understand what changed across the team.
description.personal: Deliver the latest aggregated doc digests straight to the homepage so your work overview can lead you into the newest collaboration context.

pulse.emptyTitle: No digest is ready for the homepage yet
pulse.emptyDescription: Once the same project, issue, or workflow accumulates enough structured doc changes, a digest will appear here first.

today.title: Today focus
today.description: Start with these first. They combine urgency, blockers, review requests, and your current execution state.
today.emptyTitle: Your focus queue is empty for now
today.emptyDescription: When work is waiting, in progress, or blocked, it will rise to the top here.

waiting.title: Waiting for me
waiting.description: Work that needs you to start, review, or accept a handoff.
waiting.emptyTitle: Nothing is waiting for you right now
waiting.emptyDescription: New handoffs, review requests, and ready-to-start work will land here first.

inProgress.title: In progress
inProgress.description: Work you have already picked up and are actively moving forward.
inProgress.emptyTitle: No work is currently in progress
inProgress.emptyDescription: Once you start an issue or workflow run, it will show up here.

blocked.title: Blocked
blocked.description: Work related to you that is currently blocked.
blocked.emptyTitle: No blocked items are tied to you right now
blocked.emptyDescription: Blocked work is collected here so risk does not get lost in other views.

completed.title: Completed today
completed.description: Work you finished or wrapped up today.
completed.emptyTitle: Nothing has been completed today yet
completed.emptyDescription: When you finish an issue or workflow step, today's delivery progress will show up here.

states.errorTitle: Failed to load your work overview
states.errorDescription: Please try again in a moment.

toasts.markStartedFailed: Failed to update the execution state. Please try again.
toasts.acceptHandoffFailed: Failed to accept the handoff. Please try again.
